tools.name: microsoft_docs_search
tools.description: Search official Microsoft/Azure documentation to find the most relevant and trustworthy content for a user's query. tools.name: microsoft_code_sample_search
tools.description: Search for code snippets and examples in official Microsoft Learn documentation. This tool retrieves relevant code samples from Microsoft documentation pages providing developers with practical implementation examples and best practices for Microsoft/Azure products and services related coding tasks.

tools.name: microsoft_docs_fetch
tools.description:
Fetch and convert a Microsoft Learn documentation webpage to markdown format. This tool retrieves the latest complete content of Microsoft documentation webpages including Azure, .NET, Microsoft 365, and other Microsoft technologies.
